value.code:
return {
  // family_*
  family_alone:   variables.family_alone   ?? false,
  family_partner: variables.family_partner ?? false,
  family_parents: variables.family_parents ?? false,
  family_kids:    variables.family_kids    ?? false,
  family_kids_number: Number(variables.family_kids_number || 0),

  // dependents_*
  dependents_partner: variables.dependents_partner ?? false,
  dependents_parents: variables.dependents_parents ?? false,
  dependents_kids:    variables.dependents_kids    ?? false,
  dependents_other: variables.dependents_other ?? false,
  dependents_kids_number: Number(variables.dependents_kids_number || 0),
}
